title: The Twilight Girls
writer: Jacques Lancien, Arlette Reinerg, Jean Lambertie
actors: Gaby Morlay, Henri Guisol, Marie-Hélène Arnaud
plot: A beautiful and sophisticated teenager is placed in a regimented French girls' boarding school after her father apparently commits suicide over a business scandal. She immediately gains admirers -- a lustful middle-aged artist, a ...
